title: GUI Revision+
description: A light mode texture pack inspired by GUI revision.
body:
### Credits

This project is inspired by [@Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)'s excellent resource pack [Gui Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision).

### What does it add?

- GUI for almost all in-game containers and supported mods

- Improved consistency with the vanilla-style GUI

- Added extra mod support

### Supported Mods
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [Clayworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/clayworks)
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
- [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- [Extreme Sound Muffler](https://modrinth.com/mod/extreme_sound_muffler)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Just Enought Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Miner's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight)
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
- [Overflowingbars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)
- [Storage Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers)
- [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
- [Webcam](https://modrinth.com/plugin/webcam-mod)
- [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/versions)

<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-plus)

- [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gui-revision-plus)
</details>
